Part.Source:
parm(in:&DeOndeVem, in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&PedCod, in:&PedDtaFat, in:&DefinirFinanceiro, in:&tmpNfeCod);
prompt(promptModeloDocumentos, &tmpModCod);

Event Start txtNota.Caption = '' &tmpMosVlr = 'N' do Case CAse &DeOndeVem = 'WWDEVOLUCAOVENDA' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) textBlockTitle.Caption = 'Lançamento Nota Fiscal Terceiros sem XML, Pedido:' + trim(str(&PedCod)) &PedCliCodRaz.Caption = 'Cliente:' Otherwise RetornaAutorizacao.Call('COMPRAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) textBlockTitle.Caption = 'Lançamento Nota Fiscal Terceiros sem XML, Pedido:' + trim(str(&PedCod)) EndCase LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) PedFatFilCod_IsEditaPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &IsEditar, &EditarMensagem) &tmpNfeFatFilCod.Enabled = &IsEditar For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO and PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO do 'voltar' EndiF &ImpLctCod = LctBasImpCod &ImpUfeCod = PedCliCidUfeCod &ImpGruImpCod = PedCliGruImpCod &PesGruImpNom = trim(str(PedCliGruImpCod)) + ' - ' + trim(PedCliGruImpNom) &FilCodNom = FilCodNom &PedCliCodRaz = PedCliCodRaz &PedCliCod = PedCliCod &PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq Exit EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &tmpNfeFatFilCod.TooltipText = "Filial de Faturamento" &tmpTotPro.Visible = False &tmpTotNFe.Visible = False Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = 900 Grid_TitlesCategories.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod &tmpModCod = tmpModCod &tmpNfeDtaDsp = tmpNfeDtaDsp &tmpNfeDtaEms = tmpNfeDtaEms &tmpNfeChv = retornaSonumeros.Udp(tmpNfeChv) &tmpNfeChv = &tmpNfeChv.Trim() &tmpNfeSerVar = trim(tmpNfeSer) &tmpNfeNum = tmpNfeNum &tmpNfeFatFilCod = tmpNfeFatFilCod &tmpTotPro = tmpTotPro &tmpTotFrt = tmpTotFrt &tmpTotSeg = tmpTotSeg &tmpTotOut = tmpTotOut &tmpTotDsc = tmpTotDsc &tmpTotPed = tmpTotPed &tmpTotNFe = tmpTotNFe &NfePesBrt = tmpNfePesBrt &NfeQtdVol = tmpNfeQtdVol &NfeEspVol = tmpNfeEspVol Exit EndFor &tmpModNom = RetornaNomeModeloDocumentoFiscal.Udp(&tmpModCod) do 'jalancado' EndEvent Event Grid.Load &tmpProRef.Visible = 1 &tmpProNom.visible = 0 &tmpNcmCod.Visible = 0 &tmpUnd.Visible = 0 &cstVarchar = trim(tmpNfeCstPIS.ToString()) If &tmpMosVlr = 'N' &tmpProVlrIcm.Visible = 0 &tmpProVlrIcmSt.Visible = 0 &tmpProVlrIpi.Visible = 0 &tmpProRef.visible = 0 &tmpProNom.Visible = 1 &tmpNcmCod.Visible = 1 &tmpUnd.Visible = 1 EndIf &tmpProRef.Tooltiptext = trim(tmpProNom) &tmpProNom = trim(tmpProRef) + ' - ' + trim(tmpProNom) &tmpNfeItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod &tmpProCod = tmpProCod &tmpProRef = tmpProRef &tmpNcmCod = tmpNcmCod &tmpNfeSitCod = tmpNfeSitCod &tmpCFOP = tmpCFOP do 'Produto' &tmpUnd = tmpUnd &tmpPedQtd = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,trim(toformattedString(tmpPedQtd))) &tmpPedVlrUnt = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(2,trim(toformattedString(tmpPedVlrUnt))) &tmpProVlrFrt = tmpProVlrFrt &tmpPedVlrTot = tmpPedVlrTot &tmpProPerIcm = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,trim(toformattedString(tmpProPerIcm))) &moeda = tmpProVlrIcm &tmpProVlrIcm = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(2,trim(toformattedString(&moeda))) &moeda = tmpProVlrIcmSt &tmpProVlrIcmSt = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(2,trim(toformattedString(&moeda))) &tmpProPerIcmSt = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,trim(toformattedString(tmpProPerIcmSt))) &tmpProPerIpi = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,trim(toformattedString(tmpProPerIpi))) &moeda = tmpProVlrIpi &tmpProVlrIpi = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(2,trim(toformattedString(&moeda))) &perPis = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,trim(toformattedString(tmpProPerPIS))) &perCOFIN = retiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,trim(toformattedString(tmpProPerCOFINS))) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &TabelaImposto = !'' &UserUpdate = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSalvarNota' do 'SalvarAlteracoes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_SalvarNota.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_SalvarNota.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_SalvarNota.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action SalvarNota' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCancelarFechamento' do 'voltar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMostrarValores' If &tmpMosVlr = 'S' &tmpMosVlr = 'N' BtnMostrarValores.Caption = 'Mostrar Valores' Else &tmpMosVlr = 'S' BtnMostrarValores.Caption = 'Ocultar Valores' EndiF grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSalvarAlteracoes' do 'SalvarAlteracoes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &UserUpdate.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserUpdate_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdate_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcValorImpNotaTemporaria.Create(&tmpNfeCod, &tmpNfeItmCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserUpdate_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do Action SalvarNota' ValidacoesNFeSemXml.Call(&tmpNfeCod, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 'F', &ErroMensagem) Do Case Case &tmpNfeNum.IsEmpty() msg('Favor Preencher o Número da Nota Fiscal!') Case &tmpNfeServar.IsEmpty() msg('Série da NFe não Foi informada!') CAse &tmpNfeDtaEms.IsEmpty() or &tmpNfeDtaDsp.IsEmpty() msg('Datas de Emissão e de Despacho são Obrigatorios!') Case &tmpModCod.IsEmpty() msg('Informe o Modelo de Documento da Nota Fiscal!') Case (&tmpNfeChv.IsEmpty() or &tmpNfeChv.Length() <> 44) and &tmpModCod = '66' msg('Chave da Nota Fiscal de energia é obrigatório ou informada de forma inválida!') Case not &ErroMensagem.IsEmpty() msg(&ErroMensagem) Otherwise AtualizaFaturamentoPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &tmpNfeFatFilCod) AtualizaEstoqueGerencialCompra.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedDtaFat, &Context.EmpCod, Status_Pedido.FECHADO) if &auxNfeCod > 0 //deleta nota existente ExcluirNfe.Call(&EmpCod, &tmpNfeFatFilCod, &auxNfeCod) endif GravaNotaFiscalCompraSemXml.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &tmpNfeCod) If &DefinirFinanceiro = 'S' padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_FCHDV', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wpFechaFinanceiroCompras.Call(&DeOndeVem, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod) Else do 'voltar' EndIF EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridRecordCount = Grid.RecordCount do 'totaliza' EndEvent Event &tmpNcmCod.Click wpAjustaNCMProduto.Popup(&EmpCod, &tmpProCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &tmpModCod.IsValid &tmpModNom = RetornaNomeModeloDocumentoFiscal.Udp(&tmpModCod) EndEvent Event &TabelaImposto.Click RetornaFilialBaseImposto.Call(&EmpCod, &tmpNfeFatFilCod, &FilBasImp) do 'Produto' CadastroTabelaImposto.Popup(&FilBasImp, &ImpLctCod, &ImpUfeCod, &ImpGruImpCod, &ImpCatCod ) Refresh EndEvent Event &tmpNfeFatFilCod.ControlValueChanged do 'jalancado' EndEvent Event &tmpNfeNum.ControlValueChanged do 'jalancado' EndEvent Event &tmpNfeSerVar.ControlValueChanged do 'jalancado' EndEvent Event &tmpModCod.ControlValueChanged do 'jalancado' EndEvent Sub 'totaliza' &tmpTotBasIcm = 0 &tmpTotVlrIcm = 0 &tmpTotBasSt = 0 &tmpVlrSt = 0 &tmpTotBasIpi = 0 &tmpTotIpi = 0 &tmpTotBasPis = 0 &tmpTotPis = 0 &tmpTotCofins = 0 For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNfeCod &tmpTotBasIcm += tmpProBasVlrIcm &tmpTotVlrIcm += tmpProVlrIcm &tmpTotBasSt += tmpProBasVlrIcmSt &tmpVlrSt += tmpProVlrIcmSt &tmpTotBasIpi += tmpProBasVlrIpi &tmpTotIpi += tmpProVlrIpi &tmpTotBasPis += tmpProBasPIS &tmpTotPis += tmpProVlrPIS &tmpTotCofins += tmpProVlrCOFINS EndFor EndSub Sub 'SalvarAlteracoes' &tmpNfeSer = &tmpNfeServar.Trim() &Padobs = str(&tmpNfeFatFilCod) PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'FilialCompra', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &Padobs, &PadDtaMod) &tmpNfeChv = &tmpNfeChv.Trim() &tmpNfeChv = retornaSonumeros.Udp(&tmpNfeChv) // For Each line in grid // AtualizaItemNotaTemporaria.Call(&tmpNFeCod, &tmpNfeItmCod, &tmpNfeSitCod, &tmpCFOP, &tmpPedQtd, &tmpPedVlrUnt, &tmpProVlrFrt, &tmpPedVlrTot, &tmpProBasVlrIcm, &tmpProPerIcm, &tmpProVlrIcm, &tmpProBasVlrIcmSt, &tmpProPerIcmSt, &tmpProVlrIcmSt, &tmpProBasVlrIpi, &tmpProPerIpi, &tmpProVlrIpi, 0, 0) // EndFor AtualizaCapaNotaTemporariaCompra.Call(&tmpNfeCod, &tmpNfeFatFilCod, &tmpNfeNum, &tmpNfeSer, &tmpNfeChv, &tmpNfeDtaEms, &tmpNfeDtaDsp, &tmpModCod, &tmpTotFrt, &tmpTotSeg, &tmpTotOut, &tmpTotDsc, &tmpTotPed, &NfePesBrt, &NfeQtdVol, &NfeEspVol) do 'jalancado' EndSub Sub 'jalancado' VerificaNotaJahLancada.Call(&EmpCod, &tmpNfeFatFilCod, Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS, &PedCliCod, &tmpNfeNum, &tmpNfeSerVar, &tmpModCod, &PedCod, &auxNfeCod) txtNota.Caption = '' if &auxNfeCod > 0 txtNota.Caption = 'NFe Já Lançada! SISTEMA IRÁ ATUALIZAR A NOTA JÁ LANÇADA!' Endif EndSub Sub 'voltar' &link = &DeOndeVem.Trim() + '.aspx' link(&Link) EndSub Sub 'Produto' &ImpCatCod = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &tmpProCod &ImpCatCod = ProCatCod Exit EndFor EndSub
